static.text: CityCenter Smart Parking is a modern multi-level parking facility located at 123 Main Street, Downtown Metropolis 10001. Phone: +1-555-0123. Email: info@citycenterparking.com. The facility has 4 levels with a total of 250 parking spaces, state-of-the-art security cameras, automated entry/exit gates, and electric vehicle charging stations.

Level L1 (Ground): 50 spaces with disabled parking, EV charging, wide bays. Level L2: 80 covered spaces with CCTV. Level L3: 80 covered spaces with CCTV. Level L4 (Rooftop): 40 open-air spaces with motorcycle area.

Parking policies: Maximum vehicle height 2.1 meters. No overnight parking without reservation. Lost ticket fee $25. Speed limit 10 km/h. EV charging is free for first 2 hours. Monthly pass holders get 24/7 access with a reserved spot.
Accepted payment methods: Credit Card, Debit Card, Mobile Pay, Cash at exit kiosk.
Directions: From I-90 highway take Exit 12B toward Downtown. Turn right on Main Street. Parking entrance is 200 meters on the left marked with a blue P sign. GPS: 40.7128N, 74.0060W.

To reserve a parking space provide your first name, last name, vehicle license plate number, and reservation period (start date/time and end date/time). An administrator will review and confirm your reservation.
